name: TherapyNotes Mental Health Practice API
what_it_does: TherapyNotes REST API for mental health and behavioral health practice management EHR. Enables AI agents to manage client intake and clinical records, handle appointment scheduling and reminders, process therapy session notes and treatment documentation, manage insurance billing and claims for mental health services, access client portal data, handle telehealth session integration, retrieve practice analytics, and integrate with scheduling and patient communication systems.
use_cases: Managing therapy client records and appointment scheduling from practice management agents
Processing mental health insurance billing from revenue cycle agents
Accessing clinical notes and treatment planning data from care coordination agents
Integrating therapy scheduling with telehealth from patient engagement agents
not_for: Psychiatric inpatient care without outpatient therapy management
Hospital behavioral health without private practice EHR focus
Non-licensed mental health providers without clinical documentation requirements
best_when: A mental health therapist, psychiatrist, psychologist, or group behavioral health practice using TherapyNotes wants AI agents to automate scheduling, documentation, billing, and client communication.
avoid_when: HIPAA+SENSITIVE: Mental health and behavioral health PHI has heightened sensitivity. Psychotherapy notes receive extra legal protections under HIPAA Privacy Rule. Substance use treatment may fall under 42 CFR Part 2. BAA and careful privacy handling mandatory.

auth.notes: TherapyNotes uses OAuth 2.0 and API key for API access. Practice-level credentials with clinical and billing scopes. Partner program for technology integrations. Limited public API documentation. Cloud-based platform with HIPAA Business Associate Agreement required.

pricing.paid_tiers: Per-provider monthly pricing; unlimited notes included
pricing.notes: Blue Bell, Pennsylvania. Founded 2012. Major mental health EHR competitor to SimplePractice. 100,000+ clinicians. Focus on behavioral health specialties. Psychiatry and counseling focus. All-in-one billing, scheduling, and clinical documentation. Competes with SimplePractice, TheraNest, and Kareo.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: HIPAA+SENSITIVE: Behavioral health PHI — psychotherapy notes receive extra HIPAA protections
No public MCP server — OAuth2 and API key with limited public documentation
No webhooks — polling required for appointment and clinical note updates
42 CFR Part 2 may apply for substance use disorder treatment records
Mental health billing includes complex insurance authorization and co-pay workflows
Telehealth sessions require HIPAA-compliant video platform compliance separate from API
agent_readiness.security_notes: Mental health PHI. HIPAA, SOC2. OAuth2 + API key. US data residency. BAA required. Psychotherapy notes extra protection.

security_score_components.security_notes: Mental health PHI. HIPAA, SOC2. OAuth2 + API key. US data residency. BAA required.
